detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Shark.airDrop(address[],uint256) (Shark.sol#263-281):
	External calls:
	- Buy() (Shark.sol#275)
		- this.Trade(msg.value / price,price,,owner,msg.sender) (Shark.sol#241)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- batchTransfer(_adr,_val) (Shark.sol#277)
		- balanceOf[msg.sender] -= amount (Shark.sol#87)
		- balanceOf[_receivers[i]] += _value (Shark.sol#91)

Reentrancy in Traded.Trade(uint256,uint256,bytes32,address,address) (Shark.sol#129-149):
	External calls:
	- _seller.transfer(total) (Shark.sol#139)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balanceOf[_seller] -= _qty (Shark.sol#141)
	- balanceOf[_buyer] += _qty (Shark.sol#143)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_seller,_buyer,_qty) (Shark.sol#145)
	- deal(_seller,_buyer,_qty,_price,_data) (Shark.sol#147)
